description: The Color By Speed Min Max HSV component changes the HSV values of particles in a particle system depending on their speed.

fields.MinSpeed: The speed the particle has to be be traveling at or under to be considered minimum speed.
fields.MaxSpeed: The speed the particle has to be be traveling at or above to be considered maximum speed.
fields.MinHue: The Hue to display when traveling at or below ``MinSpeed``.
fields.MaxHue: The Hue to display when traveling at or above ``MaxSpeed``
fields.MinSaturation: The Saturation to display when traveling at or below ``MinSpeed``.
fields.MaxSaturation: The Saturation to display when traveling at or above ``MaxSpeed``
fields.MinValue: The Value to display when traveling at or below ``MinSpeed``.
fields.MaxValue: The Value to display when traveling at or above ``MaxSpeed``
